{{Infobox event
| name = Ruler Trial
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] is the most difficult of the three [[Blackflame Trials]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are attempting the [[Ruler Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] involves a tablet.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] contains ninety-nine dummies.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
